holdings.infoBox: DUSL is an equity ETF with a total of 94 individual holdings. The top holdings are Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 stock at 15.41%, Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins at 8.39%, Cash at 6.72%, Industrial Select Sector Index Swap at 5.06%, and Caterpillar at 5.01%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Industrials Bull 3X ETF (DUSL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Industrial Select Sector index. The fund provides 3X leveraged exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of US industrial companies. DUSL was launched on May 3, 2017 and is issued by Direxion.
